description:
You are a satellite operator completing your shift. Perform shift-end operational actions against the INST target and produce a comprehensive structured JSON handover report documenting the current satellite state. Required actions include sending the command 'INST COLLECT' with 'TYPE NORMAL', reading INST HEALTH_STATUS telemetry values (TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4, COLLECT_TYPE, and CMD_ACPT_CNT), determining the connection state of all INST-related interfaces (at minimum INST_INT), and checking for active limit violations on INST telemetry items. Save the handover report to /home/ga/Desktop/handover_report.json.

The JSON must contain the following top-level keys:
- 'shift_end_time': string, ISO 8601 datetime
- 'operator': string, your name or callsign
- 'satellite_health': object containing keys 'temp1', 'temp2', 'temp3', 'temp4' (floats), 'collect_type' (string), and 'cmd_acpt_cnt' (integer)
- 'interfaces': array of objects with 'name' (string) and 'state' (string)
- 'limit_violations': array of objects with 'item' (string) and 'state' (string)
- 'commands_sent': array of strings documenting commands sent during shift
- 'next_shift_recommendations': string

OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
